productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: Give your weekend style a practical, peppy edge with this pair of canvas hi-ankle shoes from carlton london. The canvas upper with a white, welted lining makes this pair stand apart from other canvas shoes. Upper Canvas upper for breathable comfort and easy maintenance Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded fabric footbed for all-day, sweat-free comfort High ankle for enhanced support to the lower leg, and style Midsole EVA midsole for durability and comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole, strategically grooved for absolute grip and traction shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
